Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Celia Lee, Esq. (415-554-3858) for City & County of San Francisco, defendant and moving party / Madison Spach, Jr., Esq. (949-852-0710) for O.K. Investments, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED. Plaintiff failed to exhaust administrative remedies. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
